  "findings": [
    "No panel schedule present — panelboard circuits cannot be verified or traced",
    "Missing panel schedule violates NEC Art. 408 requirements for circuit identification",
    "Panelboard makeup incomplete without schedule; creates safety hazard for future maintenance and troubleshooting",
    "Cannot confirm circuit-to-breaker mapping or load distribution without schedule"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Create and install panel schedule per engineered drawings and specifications",
    "Verify each circuit connection against drawings and document on schedule",
    "Have inspector verify panel schedule and circuit identification before closeout",
    "Confirm working clearances per NEC 110.26 are maintained around panelboard"
  ],
  "rationale": "Panelboard is roughed in at approximately 70 percent but is non-compliant without a panel schedule as required by NEC Art. 408. The missing schedule is a defect that must be corrected before the work can pass inspection. The panelboard is installed-defective because it cannot be properly identified, traced, or safely maintained without the schedule.",
  "references": ["NEC Art. 408", "NEC 110.26", "NEC 200.4"]
}
